static.message: npm lockfile found alongside pnpm project. Remove package-lock.json to avoid dependency confusion. Use pnpm-lock.yaml only.
npm command in lifecycle script. Replace with pnpm equivalent.
shamefully-hoist=true defeats pnpm's strict dependency isolation. Remove it and fix any phantom dependency issues by adding missing deps explicitly.
Potential phantom dependency. Verify this package is listed in package.json dependencies (pnpm enforces strict node_modules).
static.note: High false positive rate. Only flag when the import fails to resolve.
